description_long: This object is a rectangular, shallow snack tray with rounded corners and a low profile. The exterior is a uniform light brown color, resembling molded pulp or biodegradable cardboard, commonly used for eco-friendly food packaging. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, with subtle ridges and a soft, unfinished look. There are no visible graphics, logos, or text on any side, giving it a plain and utilitarian appearance. The tray is likely designed to hold snacks or small food items, suitable for single-use or takeaway scenarios. Its size and shape suggest it is easy to stack or nest with similar trays.
description: A plain, light brown, rectangular snack tray with rounded corners and a matte, slightly textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the shallow height and rounded corners of the light brown tray.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the tray's low profile and elongated rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the same shallow depth and rounded edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the tray's length and flatness.
